change: Fix TypeScript errors in StorytellerHelper.tsx by replacing 'event' with 'stateChange' in appendEvent calls.

Refactored StorytellerHelper.tsx to extract UI components into a subfolder (src/components/StorytellerSub) to reduce file size. Extracted LeftLogPanel, CompactToolbar, Arena, RightConsole, and Modals.

Further split Arena and RightConsole into smaller subcomponents to adhere to file size limits. Split Arena into ArenaCenter, ArenaSeats, and ArenaQuickStrip. Split RightConsole into RightConsoleGame, RightConsoleDay, RightConsolePlayer, RightConsoleSettings, RightConsoleTags, and RightConsoleCompleted. Moved state logic into useStoryteller hook.
Fix ReferenceError in ArenaSeatTagPopout and ArenaSeatSkillPopout by defining missing isTagPopoutOpen and isSkillPopoutOpen variables.
Fix ReferenceError in ModalsEditPlayers by importing missing uniqueStrings from constants.
Cleaned up temporary refactoring scripts and organized StorytellerSub into a cleaner folder structure (Arena/, RightConsole/, Modals/). Updated imports across all subcomponents.
Added favicon.ico and favicon.png (using imp icon) to public directory and updated index.html to resolve 404 error.
